Interface IDatabaseConnectionInfo5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that provide information about the Workspace's connected database.

[Guid("C70FC5BD-4985-454B-BE1F-8408819F3900")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDatabaseConnectionInfo5 : IDatabaseConnectionInfo4, IDatabaseConnectionInfo3, IDatabaseConnectionInfo2, IDatabaseConnectionInfo
